penalties.description: No actual cutting performance was observed in the video frames. Only instructional content and FLS equipment overview were shown.

consensus_score.reasoning: Claude identified this as an instructional video with no actual task performance, while GPT-4o scored it as a completed cutting task. Given the fundamental disagreement about whether any performance occurred, Claude's assessment of no performance takes precedence as it represents the more conservative evaluation when visual evidence is disputed.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's assessment that no performance occurred is more conservative and appropriate when there is fundamental disagreement about task completion visibility.

claude_value.description: No actual cutting performance was observed in the video frames. Only instructional content and FLS equipment overview were shown.

gpt_value.description: The cut deviated outside the marked circle in two noticeable sections.

disagreements.rationale: If no performance is visible as Claude reports, then line deviation penalties cannot be assessed. The incomplete_task penalty is the appropriate automatic-zero condition.
If no actual performance occurred, no phases can be detected. This aligns with the incomplete_task assessment.
Incomplete task results in automatic zero score regardless of any other factors.
